creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mat
Date: Fri Jan 12 12:58:52 UTC 2018
New revision: 458822
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/458822

Log:
  Add a TUNING_LARGE option.

  https://kb.isc.org/article/AA-01314/0

  Tunes certain compiled-in constants and default settings to
  values better suited to large servers with 12/16GB+ of memory.
  This can improve performance on such servers, but will consume
  more memory and may degrade performance on smaller systems.

  PR:		224859
  Sponsored by:	Absolight

Changes:
  head/dns/bind9-devel/Makefile
  head/dns/bind9-devel/pkg-help
  head/dns/bind910/Makefile
  head/dns/bind910/pkg-help
  head/dns/bind911/Makefile
  head/dns/bind911/pkg-help
  head/dns/bind912/Makefile
  head/dns/bind912/pkg-help
